summary: Death certificate response times, like birth certificate response times, ticked up starting in fiscal 2025 as the Health Department's vital records office faced higher overall order volume tied to the federal Real ID policy driving increased demand for certified records. Response times have stayed well within the agency's 3-day target throughout.

sources.label: DOHMH, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: decreasing overall, despite a recent rise tied to Real ID-driven demand
